user.title: Scene Cache
user.description: Dynamically created scenes (via `scene.create`) are cached and restored across Home Assistant restarts.

init.title: Scene Cache
init.description: Choose whether to include or exclude specific scenes. Include without patterns caches nothing; exclude without patterns caches everything.

forget.name: Forget scene
forget.description: Removes a single scene from the cache.

scene_id.name: Scene ID
scene_id.description: The ID of the scene (with or without leading "scene.").

list.name: List cache
list.description: Returns all cached scenes with their entity states.
